text: Cannot be the stronghold province. Interrupt: When this province is broken – take 2 honor from your opponent.
flavorText: "Your August Imperial Majesty, your humble servant comes before you..."
name: Before the Throne

text: Earth role only. Reaction: After this province is revealed – bow each character with printed cost 2 or lower.
name: Guardians of the Seikitsu

text: Action: Choose a holding you control – you may trigger each of that holding's triggered abilities an additional time this round (or specified period). Errata from RRG v1.1
name: Kaiu Inventor

text: During the fate phase, if you have the Imperial Favor, this character cannot lose fate or be discarded.
name: Doji Shizue

text: While you have the Imperial Favor, this character does not bow as a result of conflict resolution while attacking.
flavorText: "I will not merely record history. I will forge it myself."
name: Agasha Sumiko

text: Reaction: After this holding is turned faceup – move it onto your stronghold province. Action: During a conflict at this province, sacrifice this holding. Choose an attacking character with printed cost 2 or lower – move that character home.
name: Mountaintop Statuary

text: Action: While this character is attacking – it gets +5[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict. Provinces cannot be broken during this conflict. At the end of the conflict, if you do not control a Commander character, discard this character.
flavorText: "You are the most gifted swordsman of your generation. Why must you waste your time on this cowardly art?" Akodo Gendo
name: Akodo Toshiro

text: While this character is attacking, only this character and honored characters count their skill toward the resolution of this conflit.
flavorText: "A failure before the law is a failure of honor."
name: Implacable Magistrate

text: While this character is attacking, characters with lower glory than this character do not count their skill toward the resolution of this conflict.
flavorText: "There is the Tao and there is the Law. Both are the same under Heaven."
name: Haughty Magistrate

text: Interrupt: When this character leaves play – claim the Imperial Favor.
flavorText: Flattery is the currency of the court.
name: Fawning Diplomat

text: This character gets +1 [conflict-military] and +1 [conflict-political] while you do not have the Imperial Favor.
flavorText: "It is difficult to speak clearly to those who have seen so little of the world."
name: Utaku Mediator

text:
Limit 1 per deck.
This holding adds +3 to your side during each glory count.
name: The Imperial Palace

text: Attach to a character. Play only on an attacking character. Attached character does not ready during the regroup phase. Errata from RRG v1.2
flavorText: "My apologies, samurai-san. That pit was intended for goblins." – Kaiu Shuichi
name: Pit Trap

text: Reaction: After a character you control bows as a result of conflict resolution from the second conflict you declared this round – ready that character.
flavorText: "How could the Crane do any less for our honored allies?"
name: Curry Favor

text: Monk character only. Attached character gains Tattooed. Attached character does not bow as a result of conflict resolution in conflicts in which it lost.
name: Centipede Tattoo

text: Keeper role only. Action: If attached character is defending – honor it.
flavorText:
"But mother," said the young Lion, "how am I to find glory if I remain behind?"
"You will find honor," said his mother. "And a Lion requires nothing more." – Ikoma's Chronicles
name: Guard Duty

text: Attached character gains the [clan-phoenix] clan symbol and the Scholar trait.
flavorText:
In the name of Lady Shiba Tsukune,
the Soul of Shiba,
Protector of the Council,
Keeper of the Tao,
Daimyō of the Shiba, and
Champion of the Phoenix Clan
name: Seal of the Phoenix

text: Keeper role only. Action: Choose a player – that player draws 1 card and loses 1 honor.
flavorText: "No one could accuse you of vanity with such a style."
name: Backhanded Compliment

text: Action: If you control a [clan-unicorn] card, choose a non-[clan-unicorn] character – ready the chosen character.
flavorText: They stood, unmoving, each unsure how to proceed.
name: Gaijin Customs

text: Reaction: After 1 or more honor is given to you from an honor bid – gain that much honor. (Max 1 per round.)
flavorText: As Lady Sun's brilliance illuminates the land, so too does her chosen son radiate peace and prosperity to all Rokugan.
name: Way of the Chrysanthemum
